## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] New module has tests
- [ ] Stays within MVP/V1 scope (see `CLAUDE.md` milestones)
- [ ] No new `any`, no disabled lint rules without a comment explaining why
